raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet pahr teem Landim/ 
kas eekſch Juhda Semmes bij 
atliktſchi/ ko Nebukadnezars 
tas Babeles Kehniſsch bij atliz- 
zinajs/ eczehle wiſch Gedaltju 
Aikama/Sawana Dehla Dehtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nn wiſſi Karra Ah- 
werſti ar faueemi Wihreem dſir- 
deja/ ta tas Babeles Kehniſsch 
Gedaltju par Wirneeku bij ee- 
zehtis/ tad nahze tee pee Gedali- 
ju us Mizpu/ ar Wahrdus Isua- 
els Metanijs Dehls/ un Joa- 
nans Kareus Dehls/ un Sera- 
jus Tanuneta Dehls tas Neto- 
watiteris/ un Jaesanijs Maë- 
kata Dehls/ tec atnahze ar fa- 
weem Wihreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Gedaltjs fwehreja 
teem un winau Wihreem/ un 
fazzija us teem: Ne bihſteetees 
teem Kaldeëreem kalpoht/ palee- 
zeet eekſch Semmes/ un kalpo- 
jeet tam Babeles Kehnimam/ tad 
juns labbi klahfees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ſeptitã Mehneſi nah- 
ze Isnaels Metanijs Dehls/ ta 
Dehla Gelisaima/ no Kehnina 
Dsimmuna/ un deﬁnitã Wihri 
ar winnu/ un kawe Gedaltju/ ka 
tas nomirre- lihds ar teem Ju- 
deem un Kaldeëreem/kas pee win- 
na eekſch Mizpas bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs wiſſi Lau- 
dis/ tik labbt mast ka teeli/ ir tec 
Karra Ahwerſti/ un nahze uhs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un triuſdeﬁnits ſeptita 
Gaddã pehz/ kad Joakins tas 
Kehniſsch no Juhda atſwests 
bija/ divipadeﬁnita Mehneſi/di- 
wideﬁnits ſeptita Mehnes Dee- 
na/ va angſtinaja EewilMero- 
daks tas Babeles Kehniſsch/ tad 
Gaddã/ kad tas par Kehniu 
tappe/ Joakina ta Kehnina no 
Juhda Galwu/ no ta Zeetuma 
Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch runnaja laip- 
nigi ar to/ un likke wiſſa Krebſ- 
lu pahr wiſſem Kehniu Krebſ- 
leem/ kas pee wiſſa Babelẽ 
bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch pabrinthja 
winna Zeetuma Drebes/ un 
tas ehde weenumebr wiſſa 
Preekſcha/ kamehr wiſch dſih- 
woja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch nospreede wiſ- 
nam par Uſturreſchanu weenu 
deeniſſu Dalku/ ko tas no ta 
Kehnina ikdeenas dabbuja/ ka- 
mebr wiſch dſihwoja.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
